positive_prompt: Minecraft panorama with shaders, blocky voxel world; lush forests, rivers, mountains, glowing sunlight, reflective water; realistic shadows, bloom, god rays, vibrant colors, cinematic lighting; stylized, high-detail, photoreal touch.
